dialogue.speaker: fih
dialogue.text: I hope you are having a good day.

dialogue.speaker: fisher
dialogue.text: Oh. I'm sorry for your loss.

dialogue.speaker: fih
dialogue.text: My apologies for the confusion, I meant she's missing.

dialogue.speaker: fisher
dialogue.text: If only I had a clock that could rewind time.

dialogue.speaker: fisher
dialogue.text: Then I'd be able to reverse all this pain.

dialogue.speaker: fih
dialogue.text: It's a magical clock that rewinds time, yet I cannot use it for I have fins.

dialogue.speaker: fih
dialogue.text: Please use it to heal me.

dialogue.speaker: fih
dialogue.text: Yo, do you know the way to the world cup?

dialogue.speaker: fih
dialogue.text: My favorite player Mfishe is playing today.

dialogue.speaker: fih
dialogue.text: Mfishe, the number one fishball player in the world.

dialogue.speaker: fih
dialogue.text: Anyway, you gotta get me to the world cup its Atlantic vs Red Sea and I gotta rep.

dialogue.speaker: fih
dialogue.text: Thank you for reuniting me with my wife.

dialogue.speaker: fisher
dialogue.text: Don't worry, there are plenty of fish in the sea.

dialogue.speaker: fih
dialogue.text: Too bad this is a lake.
